message:
✨ Add stat block click handlers to 8 dashboards

Add drill-down click handlers to stat blocks on:
- Deployments: drill to healthy/degraded/issues deployments
- Pods: drill to issues/pending/high-restart pods
- Operators: drill to installed/installing/upgrading/failing operators
- Events: drill to events by type (warning, normal)
- Cost: drill to cost breakdown by resource type
- Alerts: drill to active/resolved alerts
- Nodes: drill to compute view, GPU nodes
- Services: drill to services by type (LoadBalancer, NodePort, ClusterIP)

Each stat block now shows cursor-pointer and hover state when clickable,
providing visual feedback and navigation to relevant drill-down views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
